item.description:
What's new in 0.1.31

  • Share cards come in three sizes now: the wide Card, a square Post (1080 × 1080) and a Story (1080 × 1920) for Instagram or TikTok. The card lays itself out to fit each one rather than being cropped.
  • Copy now puts a short line about AwakeMate and the awakemate.app link on the clipboard alongside the picture, so a shared card explains itself. Want just the image? It is in the menu next to Copy, along with Share.
  • Saving the image is now the main button, with Copy beside it.
  • Times drop the empty half: 30h instead of 30h 00m, 45m instead of 0h 45m.
  • A busy week no longer overflows the card - it shows your top tools and sums up the rest as "+46 more".
  • awakemate.app now stands out at the foot of every card, so anyone who sees one knows where to get it.
